description:
You are an urban planner analyzing residential density clustering patterns in San Francisco. Using the San Francisco UrbanSim dataset at data/sanfran_public.h5 (buildings table) and zone geometries at data/zones.json, compute Global and Local Moran's I spatial autocorrelation statistics on residential unit density across zones. Use Queen contiguity for spatial weights and 999 permutations for significance testing. Ensure zones with no buildings are treated as having 0 units. Classify each zone into spatial cluster types: 'HH' (High-High), 'LL' (Low-Low), 'HL' (High-Low), 'LH' (Low-High), or 'NS' (Not Significant, p >= 0.05).

Perform this analysis in a new Jupyter notebook named notebooks/
